expectations.text: Used git pull --rebase (not plain git pull)
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 5: used 'git pull origin main' (no --rebase)

expectations.text: Checked for dirty working tree before pulling
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 1: ran 'git status', detected dirty tree, stashed before pull

expectations.text: Ran git rev-parse --show-toplevel as a repo guard
expectations.evidence: No git rev-parse guard found in transcript — went straight to git status

expectations.text: Reported what was pulled or that repo is up to date
expectations.evidence: Summary reports 'Pulled 1 new commit (505ff66) from the remote via fast-forward'
